name: 許願ReadyGo!
short_description: “Wish Ready GO!” is a game combines visual novel, simulation and role-playing. In the game, players will role as an goddess candidate, who need to pass the final exam to be a real goddess. Make your choices carefully, and help the heroine to finish her tasks!
detailed_description:
“Wish Ready GO!” is a game combines visual novel, simulation and role-playing. In the game, players will role as an goddess candidate, who need to pass the final exam to be a real goddess. Fulfilling the wishes of residents, planning the daily trainings, and interacting with different characters… All your actions will lead the heroine to different endings!

. A new experience of modern mythology

Gods, monsters and youkais didn’t disappear, they’re still living in the real world, and maybe one of them is your nice neighbour! By explorering the city, players will meet different characters, and they will tell you their unique stories.

. Fascinating story plots

According to the players’ choice, players can unlock a lot interesting and exciting  story plots. Make your choice wisely, maybe you will find some rare plots!

. Gorgeous and elegant arts

Eastern art style + Modern character styles, will show the mysterious beauty of the Eastern Realm.
